summary: Manifest entry for transcendental-magic (Global Grey HTML) + verified acquire into raw/

Waite' (author is Lévi — Waite is translator only), license=public_domain.

Include a VERIFIED 2026-07-14 comment in manifest style: HTTP 200 w/ browser UA, 760KB, h2 volume headers + 47 h3 chapter headers, Waite text spot-checked; PD rationale (pre-1930 US, Waite d.1942 life+70 expired 2013); GG terms satisfied because branding/markup stripped at ingest; sacred-texts and Gutenberg checked and do not host it.

Done: manifest entry committed; python scripts/acquire.py downloads clean raw HTML for this source id without disturbing other sources (use whatever single-source filter acquire supports, or verify idempotence).

resolution.note: Manifest entry + VERIFIED comment added. acquire.py --only transcendental-magic extracts 1.43M chars cleanly (starts 'Volume One: Dogme Introduction Behind the veil...', ends 'THE END'; GG TOC/chrome stripped by container selection; single-line output matches established generic_html format).
